original_prompt: 给这个手串做一张淘宝主图，要求深色背景的女性高级礼盒面板或者放点黑白的玫瑰，文案居中
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
High-end Chinese E-commerce Jewelry Photography, Low-key Luxury Vibe. The subject is [Subject Lock: A premium beaded bracelet composed of uniformly sized, perfectly spherical beads. The geometry is a continuous toroid formed by a string of approximately 16-18 identical spheres. Each bead acts as a lens, exhibiting high refraction and clarity, characteristic of clear quartz or crystal. A distinctive visual feature is the visible internal threading channel running through the center of each sphere, creating a horizontal line refraction effect within the transparent volume]. 
Position: The bracelet rests elegantly on a dark, premium velvet gift box panel in the lower center. 
Props: Artistically arranged Black and White Roses surround the bracelet, adding a monochrome romantic aesthetic. 
Background: Deep charcoal or black seamless background, enhancing the transparency of the beads. 
Lighting: Focused 'Pin Spotlight' and 'Rim Lighting' to make the crystal beads sparkle against the darkness, creating high contrast.

[Text & UI Layout]
***Layout Style**: Center Aligned / Top-Center Focus (居中排版).
Text Rendering Instructions (Gold or White text on dark background):
1. **Main Title**: Content: "纯净白水晶". Position: [Center Top Negative Space]. Style: [Serif Font, Elegant, Glossy White or Metallic Gold].
2. **Sub Title**: Content: "甄选高定礼盒 · 挚爱之礼". Style: [Thin, letter-spaced, smaller than main title].
3. **Marketing Banner**: Content: "七夕甄选". Style: [Minimalist Gold Frame Border].
4. **Trust Badge**: Content: "高透晶体". Style: [Small circular stamp icon].
layout_logic: Considering the 'Dark Background' and 'Centered Text' request: 1. Place the bracelet slightly below the absolute visual center to anchor the composition. 2. Place the Main Title and Subtitle in the 'Top Center' negative space. This creates a balanced 'Text over Product' hierarchy (Classic Poster Style). 3. The high-contrast lighting on the beads is crucial so they don't disappear into the dark background.
